sentences.arabic: شَعَرْتُ بِصُدَاعٍ شَدِيدٍ يَوْمَ أَمْسِ بَعْدَ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam osjetio jaku glavobolju nakon posla.
sentences.translationEn: Yesterday, I felt a severe headache after work.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِشِرَاءِ بَعْضِ الدَّوَاءِ الْمُنَاسِبِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u apoteku da kupim neki odgovarajući lijek.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy to buy some appropriate medicine.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَانِي الصَّيْدَلِيُّ بَعْضَ النَّصَائِحِ حَوْلَ كَيْفِيَّةِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْعِلَاجِ.
sentences.translation: Apotekar mi je dao nekoliko savjeta o tome kako koristiti terapiju.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist gave me some advice on how to use the treatment.
